title: Ironfist Dwarf can battle again after low damage

card.rawText: During your turn, if this creature inflicts 5 or less Atk damage during battle, it may initiate battle again without the targeted creature being able to return attack. This effect can occur up to 5 times.

effect.value: During your turn, if this creature inflicts 5 or less Atk damage during battle, it may initiate battle again without the targeted creature being able to return attack. This effect can occur up to 5 times.

plan.title: Ironfist Dwarf can battle again after low damage
plan.summary: Deal 5 or less Atk damage with Ironfist Dwarf and verify the extra-battle/no-retaliation route.

forcedRolls.label: Headless Gen3 QA low damage route

notes: Read text first: During your turn, if this creature inflicts 5 or less Atk damage during battle, it may initiate battle again without the targeted creature being able to return attack. This effect can occur up to 5 times.

steps: Verify extra battle route is represented.
